text:
# Serving llms.txt on Vercel

Great question! There are **two main approaches** [1]:

## **Option A: Static File** (simplest for Next.js)
Place the generated `llms.txt` file in your **`public/`** directory. It will be served automatically at `https://example.com/llms.txt`.

1. Download `llms.txt` from the Setup tab (you're on it now)
2. Add it to `/public/llms.txt` in your repo
3. Deploy to Vercel
4. Verify it's live: visit `https://example.com/llms.txt` in your browser

## **Option B: Proxy Route** (keeps files auto-updated)
If you can't or prefer not to commit static files, set up a redirect in your Next.js API:

- Your `/llms.txt` → proxies to `https://geo.flowblinq.com/api/serve/{your-slug}/llms.txt`

This automatically updates when you re-run audits [1].

---

**Your Setup tab should show you the exact code and file names for Vercel.** Can you see the integration instructions on this page? If you need help implementing either approach, paste what you're seeing in the Setup tab and I'll walk you through it step-by-step.
